overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character sailing a felucca boat along a desert riverbank with palm trees and cliffs, then transitioning to walking through an ancient Egyptian city with grand columned temples, statues, and market stalls under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert river with sandy banks and palm trees

events.description: hard cut from boat on water to walking in ancient city

agents.ego_description: standing on a felucca boat sailing along the water near desert shores

entered.detail: traditional wooden sailboat with cargo and single mast
tall rocky cliffs with layered sedimentary rock faces
cluster of date palms along the shoreline
light-colored sand beach along the water edge
simple wooden pier structure extending into water

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view from behind a character sailing a wooden felucca boat on calm waters. The boat moves past a sandy beach lined with palm trees, with large desert cliffs rising in the background. A wooden dock appears on the right as the boat continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple complex with colonnaded walkway and market area

events.description: transition from boat scene to walking through ancient city with columned buildings
entering more open area with market stalls and scattered pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the temple colonnade, passing statues and approaching market stalls

notable_agents.action: standing near the temple wall conversing with another person

entered.detail: large stone building with tall red columns and decorative friezes
tall white marble statue of a robed figure on pedestal
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the path
large black urn containing palm plant
wooden market stall with orange fabric canopy and goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit stone path beside a grand temple with tall red columns and white stone walls. The camera follows from behind as the character passes statues, decorative fences, and potted plants. The path opens into a more populated area with market stalls and scattered NPCs, with cypress trees lining the right side of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement that transitions from a serene river voyage into the bustling heart of an ancient Egyptian city. It begins behind a character sailing a wooden felucca boat across calm waters, gliding past a sandy beach lined with palm trees and towering desert cliffs. As the boat approaches a wooden dock, the scene shifts to the character walking along a sunlit stone path beside a grand temple featuring tall red columns and white stone walls. The camera continues to follow from behind, passing decorative fences and statues before the path opens into a populated area filled with market stalls and NPCs. The journey finally concludes as the walkway expands, lined with cypress trees under the bright midday sun.
